# Tealium Documentation

Explore guides and tutorials for Tealium's customer data platform

## About this index

This is a directory of Tealium documentation organized by area. Each area links to its own llms.txt file containing a full index of pages within that area.

## Accessing markdown versions

All documentation pages are available in clean markdown format for easier processing. To access the markdown version of any page, append `/index.md` to the page URL.

Example:
- HTML version: `https://docs.tealium.com/ja/iq-tag-management/overview/`
- Markdown version: `https://docs.tealium.com/ja/iq-tag-management/overview/index.md`

## Documentation areas

- [Tag Management](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/iq-tag-management/llms.txt): Client-side tag management documentation including iQ Tag Management, Tealium iQ, and tags configuration
- [Server-Side](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/server-side/llms.txt): Server-side documentation including EventStream, Functions, and AudienceStream
- [APIs](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/api/llms.txt): Developer API documentation and reference guides
- [Web Install](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/platforms/web-install/llms.txt): Web platform installation guides including JavaScript library, tag manager integrations, and server-side SDKs
- [Mobile Install](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/platforms/mobile-install/llms.txt): Mobile platform installation guides including iOS SDK, Android SDK, and cross-platform frameworks
- [Client-Side Tags](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/client-side-tags/llms.txt): Documentation for individual client-side tags and vendor integrations
- [Server-Side Connectors](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/server-side-connectors/llms.txt): Documentation for individual server-side connectors and vendor integrations
- [Administration](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/administration/llms.txt): Platform administration including user access, permissions, security settings, and account management
- [Consent](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/consent/llms.txt): Consent capture, interpretation, and enforcement across client-side and server-side environments
- [Guides](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/guides/llms.txt): Practical guides and strategies for using Tealium effectively
- [Predict](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/predict/llms.txt): Predict ML documentation for machine learning-powered audience predictions
- [Partners and Industries](https://docs.tealium.com/ja/partners-and-industries/llms.txt): Industry-specific integrations and partnership documentation
